## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify your change? -->

- [ ] `bash -n torchain && bash -n setup.sh` pass
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall .` passes
- [ ] `trc doctor` passes on my machine
- [ ] Ran `trc leaktest` (if the change touches routing / firewall)
- [ ] Tested the affected commands manually

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style of the project.
- [ ] I updated the README / CHANGELOG where relevant.
- [ ] My change does not introduce any DNS/IP/IPv6 leak.
